name_en: Premium Original Leather M24729 Black mini. This Capucines mini handbag is crafted from fine Taurillon leather, brightened by a lustrous handle ring and the iconic LV letters. The detachable shoulder strap allows for easy conversion between shoulder and crossbody wear. Dimensions: 21 × 13.6 × 8 cm
